claims.quote: Join a special team of volunteers—from teens to seniors, and even some furry friends—who bring comfort and joy to our patients.
claims.claimText: System-level Northwell volunteer page describes general patient-comfort volunteering across all Northwell hospitals; no mention of medical students, IMGs, premed clinical experience, or observership.
claims.limitations: Health-system scope (northwell.edu) cannot produce a Staten Island campus-specific USCE claim without explicit campus-applicability proof.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic hospital volunteer page with no medical-student / IMG / clinical observership language; not USCE-relevant on its face.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.quote:
Staten Island University Hospital475 Seaview Avenue
Staten Island, NY 10305
claims.claimText: Staten Island University Hospital is listed among Northwell volunteer hospital sites with a mailing address but no medical-education-related content.
claims.limitations: Mere listing of the campus on a system-level volunteer index does not constitute a USCE offer; address is the only campus-specific signal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Campus appears only as an address in a system-wide volunteer site list; no medical-student, observership, or trainee content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.quote: Become a Northwell volunteerReady to make a meaningful impact? Begin by exploring our hospital locations and the unique programs offered at each to discover your ideal volunteer opportunity.
claims.claimText: Source is a Northwell health-system-wide volunteer landing page; programs differ per hospital and page does not describe Staten Island specifically.
claims.limitations: Page explicitly defers program detail to per-hospital sub-pages; cannot be attributed to Staten Island University Hospital.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Health-system scope page that defers content to campus pages; scope conflict with single-institution claim attribution.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.quote: For more information on the studies above or research in the Division of General Pediatrics, please contact Caren Steinway at [email protected] .
claims.claimText: Research contact for the Division of General Pediatrics at Cohen Children's: Caren Steinway, [email protected].
claims.limitations: Contact is for Cohen Children's (Queens), not Staten Island University Hospital — scope mismatch with the named institution.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the scope conflict but did not extract the explicit research-contact email/name embedded near the end of the page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Research contact is a logistical detail relevant to pre-residency research-elective inquiry (Tier 1), even though scope conflict will likely block public publication.
claims.visibilityRationale: A3 downgrade: Research-contact email for Caren Steinway at Cohen Children's Division of General Pediatrics — RESEARCH_PAGE source, no USCE offer, wrong institution (Cohen Children's, not SIUH).
